title: Amazon Spent $200 Billion on AI. Your Ad Efficiency Is About to Pay for It.
desc: Platform earnings season just told you exactly where the next two years of margin pressure are coming from. Most brands aren't listening.

title: TikTok Shop's Brand Safety Problem Just Went Viral
desc: TikTok blocked 70M fraudulent listings in H1 2025. A brand filed federal suit in January. Ulta just launched anyway. Here is what operators need to weigh.
